prd_refs: §6.5 — JSON mode required, no Markdown output.
description: Issue chat-completion requests against `/v1/chat/completions` with configurable model, system prompt, user messages, temperature, top_p, timeout, and JSON-mode toggle. Surface response content as a single string for parsers.
notes: Some Ollama versions ignore `response_format`; do not fail if the field is unsupported — the parse + repair layer (mdl-04) handles output discipline.
steps: TDD: Sends `Authorization: Bearer ollama` header (per §3.2 OpenAI-compatible client).
TDD: Body includes `model`, `messages`, `temperature`, `response_format` when JSON mode on.
TDD: Retry once on transient failure; otherwise returns structured error.
Mock the network call in tests.
Surface non-2xx responses with a structured error including status + body.
name: [mdl-02] Invoke-OllamaChat (chat completions)
